justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all temporal expressions throughout the conversation, including specific dates and time ranges.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and then asked the user to suggest new times or days, rather than proactively offering alternative slots.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made a slightly redundant API call in Turn 2 by checking for availability on June 8th again, even though the user had already specified a new time range for that day.
justifications.customer_experience: The conversation felt a bit tiring due to the agent's repetitive responses of unavailability and its lack of proactive suggestions, requiring the user to drive the search for an available slot.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained full context of the topic and contact medium throughout the conversation, even when the user changed their preferred dates and times multiple times.
